specific_mechanism: new ultrametric-tree attention layer introducing new positional learnable parameter and new tree-based positional pathway (new computation graph edges)
llm_application: new ultrametric-tree attention layer: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new positional learnable parameter) implementing new ultrametric-tree attention layer; the module adds new tree-based positional pathway between existing layers, creating new hierarchical learnable bridge that the baseline lacks; module is NOT a function of existing parameters
